title: Easy Crafting
description: Obtain various monster drops in peaceful mode
body:
# Craft unobtainable items in peaceful mode with ease!
This pack is being updated regularly, so I suggest keeping an eye out for new versions!

Easy Crafting is a datapack for 1.19.2-1.20.4 which seamlessly enables crafting of monster-only drops, such as spider-eyes, string or gunpowder.
The crafting process is kept as realistic as possible.

**I recommend using [JEI mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) to view crafting recipes.**

**The following drops can be obtained:**

- Strings (from wool)
- Spider Eyes (Smelting rotten flesh)
- Rotten flesh (Beef + Poisonous potato)
- Saddle (From leather + other materials)
- Gunpowder (From charcoal and flint)
- Bone (From bonemeal and clay)
- Blaze rod (Stick + 4x flint)
- Nether Quartz (Diorite)
- Glowstone Dust (Lava bucket)
- Netherite (Diamond block + More)

![Crafting strings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e6907cc964b80ea27177472fbdd5cc43007d4d8.png)      ![Crafting a saddle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b2387fa06ec7bc6192d1ad089cd87482e3ee189.png) ![Crafting rotten flesh](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e7725150c57e22452a46943b930bcbe6ab84566.png)
